
1. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 6/3/26, 4:52 PM
    
    In the dark of a moonless night, in a valley surrounded by hills, the former village of Oaktop is a smoldering ruin. Wispy smoke rises from the remains of small-but-proud houses, now reduced to piles of ash. In the square, a pile of horrors is surrounded by flies. The faint stench of smoke and decay reaches to the hilltops. But around the entrance to the silver mine, there is activity. Lights on poles show redcaps bringing ore to the surface and dumping it onto sledges. Trolls are hooked up to the sledges, while satyrs supervise. Sitting on a rock above this scene of destruction and looting, Pavel thinks about women.
    
2. He hears Astor clanking stealthily up behind him. Astor stops next to Pavel's rock, glances up at him, and says "Any change?" "Nope," Pavel replies. He had already taken care of the guards on the hilltops; Neryssa's forces in the valley were completely blind. Astor grunts. "Good. We're about to start. Riven's forces will feint from the west, and when they fall back, hopefully Neryssa's forces will follow. Then we hit them." Pavel barely listens. He keeps replaying the scene from this morning in his mind, trying to figure out what it meant. Cat yawns beside him.
    
3. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 6/3/26, 5:00 PM
    
    Finally Pavel looks down from his perch. "Astor, you understand women, right?”
    
4. Attn @Danny , @Slava [Astor] , @Wes [Riven] , @Billy [Milo] , @Tom [Lee] , @Jon [Lucas]
    
5. ### Slava [Astor] [FROG],  _—_ 6/10/26, 5:49 PM
    
    **"...Is now....no, you've got that look. You won't be able to focus until you get it out, eh Pavel? Let's have it then."** _Astor pulls out a bag of dried tea leaves and a thermos with hot water. He pours it into a brewing kettle and sits down._
    
6. _The tea cups themselves are incredibly dainty. He says they're 'travel-sized'_
    
7. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 6/10/26, 5:57 PM
    
    "Well, you married one, right? Or you got one to marry you, I don't know how that works. But I figure it must mean you have an understanding of some sort. "So what does it mean when a woman says she wants to be friends?" With his magically enhanced darkvision, Pavel thinks he can see Riven's archers taking up a position at the west end of the valley.
    
8. ### Slava [Astor] [FROG],  _—_ 6/10/26, 6:17 PM
    
    _Astor picks up the kettle and tilts it forward. It misses the cups entirely and spills onto the earth._ **"Like most of life, it depends on the situation. I told my now-wife I wanted to be friends, because I was scared it might be too much to ask for more."** _He extends the hot leaves forward to Pavel for a sniff._ **"Smell that? Lightly floral? Anyway, what would it mean if you said you want to be friends with her?"** _More hot water enters the kettle._
    
9. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 6/10/26, 6:42 PM
    
    Pavel thinks hard. “Well, my only friends are the people I go kill things with. And Linzi, of course. She’s friends with everyone. Is that what women do with their friends? Go kill things? That doesn’t sound right…” He frowns. Just then a light illuminates the valley below, centered between Riven’s forces and the silver mine where the trolls and satyrs are working. They pause, looking up, and then start running to gather weapons as arrows whistle down out of the dark. “Get ready!” Pavel calls back softly to the people hidden behind them. “It’s almost time.”
    
10. ### Slava [Astor] [FROG],  _—_ 6/10/26, 7:18 PM
    
    _Astor grunts and grabs his horned helm. He curses as he stands up, that tea set was a gift from his in-laws. His wife will kill him if he's lost it._ **"Look Pavel, friends aren't the people you take lives with. They're the people you share life with!"** _He glances back and thuds a gauntlet against his plate._ **"The rest of you catch that? Remember them in the moments to come!"**
    
11. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 6/10/26, 10:51 PM
    
    Below them, an astonishingly large number of arrows seem to miss their targets, as the trolls and satyrs form up into a line with only a few casualties. A large troll dressed in robes of fur raises a staff topped with a human skull, and chants an incantation. A fireball erupts among the grouped archers. Half of them disappear in illusory mist, while the remainder, apparently unscathed, appear to start running. Pavel chuckles. “Did you see that, Astor? Lucas is going to be bragging about that illusion for the next week.” The line of trolls and satyrs starts to charge, chasing the supposedly fleeing archers. Pavel leaps from his rock, transforming one of Astor’s tea cups into travel-sized shards. “Let’s go!” he hisses. “The shaman is mine.” Pavel hears the whoosh of Rindle’s engines behind him, and watches as Lee sprints past, laughing. Pavel slows his pace to match Astor’s as the big man charges down the hill, plate armor jangling. “So… Theoretically, if a woman said she respected you and didn’t want to play games, and she liked Cat and wanted to be your friend, what would you do next? Theoretically.”
12. ### Slava [Astor] [FROG],  _—_ 4:39 PM

	_Astor's helm has proven up to the task of shielding him from blade and claw before, but now it also shields Pavel from his furious expression._ _He pulls a lever as he tries to keep up with Pavel_ **"Serenity now...."** _A hiss and the brew he'd put in the armor's tank washes over him, distancing him from the rising rage. Changing his perspective, to a neutral observer. Maybe Milo can make a replica later. It will all be okay._ _As Pavel slows down for him, Astor breathes out._ **"Well, if I was as curious as you seem to be... theoretically, I'd tell her I'd like to get to know her better. Maybe over a nice meal."**

1. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ 6/18/26, 12:50 AM
    
    Pavel looks horrified. "You mean talk to her? What would I have to talk to her about?" The troops ahead of them slow down as they prepare to engage the illusionary archer corps, so Pavel and Astor pick up speed and reach level ground. _Almost there._ Pavel grins with the thrill of the chase. At that moment, Neryssa's troops stop and pivot with a level of discipline one would not have expected from troops such as these. The satyrs pull crossbows from straps on their back, already cranked back, and insert bolts into the firing mechanism. They fire a volley of deadly metal. Lee dodges sideways deftly, while the bolts rattle against Rindle's armored body. Milo, clinging to Rindle's back, gives a shout. Pavel, deeply absorbed in his personal dilemma, reacts too slowly. As the bolts streak toward Pavel's chest, Astor throws out his shield, deflecting the oncoming storm while his own plate armor takes hits. Pavel winces. Astor's reaction had nearly come too late. Given the big man's tremendous reflexes, the delay had been unusual.
    
2. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ Yesterday at 9:00 AM
    
    Ahead of them, the satyrs charge at Lee and Milo en masse, hoping to cut them down while the party is still split up. The trolls, meanwhile, split up. One group forms a bodyguard in front of two powerful shamans, who send spells streaking toward the location where Riven and Lucas have hidden themselves with their small group of Nightmarch archers. Screams fill the air as lightning is pulled from the sky into their midst. The other trolls move to intercept Astor and Pavel. They swing wicked axes in each hand, and smile grotesquely as they wait for battle. Pavel hears Astor mutter a word his wife surely would not approve of. Together they race forward. “Go help Lee and Milo, Pavel,” Astor commands. “I’ll catch up.” They reach the line of trolls together. Astor slams into it with his shield while Pavel plants a foot and springs high into the air. Above the trolls’ heads, he tucks and somersaults, pulling a small figurine out of a pocket in his jerkin. He lands in a crouch and lets the figurine drop to the ground. Cat, dark as night, materializes on the ground next to him and lets out a bestial roar. “That’s right, Cat. It’s time to dance.” For a moment, Pavel’s mind flickers back to a vision of Edina dancing, years before. Pavel could no more dance _The Sword and the Suitor_ than Cat could breathe water or fly – but together, he and Cat are masters at the _Dance of Death_. For a moment, his world makes sense again. He is a Warden, chief defender of his pack, and anybody trying to harm the pack must get through him. If that role demands his blood – or even Cat’s – that is just the way of the world. Pavel smiles and throws himself at the ring of satyrs engulfing Milo and Lee. Briar flickers in and out of their midst, drawing blood with its precision strikes but also, critically, keeping the satyrs continually confused and perplexed. Lee and Milo land heavy blows, and the satyrs start to fall.
    
3. In the back of Pavel’s mind, he feels a … Presence … growing as he strikes down his foes. The Presence fills him with warmth and a strange sense of pleasure. Not the ordinary pleasure of defeating his foes, but the self-conscious pleasure of having pleased someone and received a smile. The feeling makes him think vaguely of both his mother and Edina, in different ways. It’s very uncomfortable. Even worse, he can feel the Presence pushing at his emotional centers, trying to form thoughts and words in his head.  
    Pavel cuts down a satyr and the remainder take flight. Stopping next to Lee and Rindle, Pavel smiles. He hears a roar behind him, and turns to see a gigantic troll with axes in both hands. He prepares to dodge. The Presence in his head purrs delightedly – but not like Cat purrs. This is more like the fake purr he sometimes hears from women back in Nightmarch, who are competing for a man’s attention. Feeling grossly violated to have this voice in his head, he pushes back at it mentally. His head is abruptly filled by a memory of Edina looking at him intently, as if she were trying to say something with her eyes. _(What a strange metaphor; eyes don’t talk.)_ He remembers her touch on his shoulder, and her words: “Be careful. I don't want our new friendship to end just as it's getting started." Foolishness. He couldn’t be careful! He was the Warden of Nightmarch.
    
4. Gripped by indecision, Pavel barely notices the axe swinging at his head. Suddenly Astor is there, holding a shield high. The blow rings off the shield as Astor staggers under the weight of the troll’s man-sized axe. “Get your head back in the fight, boy!” Astor snarls. Pavel dodges underneath the swing of the axe from the troll’s other arm. _What am I going to do about Edina?_ He circles around behind the troll and starts probing for ways through the troll’s guard. _She said she wanted to be friends, but she also said that Pavel was in her thoughts in an unusual way. That didn’t sound like being friends. How was he supposed to know what she meant?_ Astor strikes the troll with his shield and pushes it toward Pavel. Pavel violently ends its monstrous life and looks around for new prey. _Astor said I should talk to her. Can I really do that?_ It sounds terrifying. Pavel runs toward the nearest ogre, drops to a roll, and passes between the ogre’s legs to come up behind it. _What would I even talk to her about? She probably doesn’t want to hear about Cat._ He strikes at the ogre’s back, and is gratified to see that this moment of distraction enables Lee to land a deadly blow to the ogre’s heart. Pavel pivots and sees one of the troll shamans, standing not 15 feet away. _Could I just ask her what she meant?_ That would be satisfyingly direct, but Pavel had no idea what would happen next. Conversation wasn’t predictable, like the weather. And if he couldn’t predict it, he couldn’t prepare for it. The troll shaman points a skull-topped staff his direction. _What if I don’t like the answer?_ Pavel thinks worriedly. A bolt of lightning arcs from the end of the staff and hits him squarely in the chest. His world goes black.
    
5. Moments later, Pavel feels the icy chill of Aunt Sumi’s healing spirit, together with a comforting sense of disappointment and disapproval. Back on familiar emotional ground, he takes stock of his physical environment. Astor is beating back the troll shaman with his shield, while the other shaman suffers staggering blows from Riven’s enchanted bow. The remaining satyrs and trolls have retreated a little way away. Pavel flips to his feet and looks around for Cat. He finds the big feline fighting alongside Astor, looking bloodied but not seriously hurt. Lucas is nearby, tending to a bloodied wound on Lee’s sword arm. _This,_ thinks Pavel. _This is what friends are. Not whatever Edina meant. That can’t possibly be friends._ At that moment, a cheer goes up from the remaining satyrs and trolls. In front of them, the darkness itself has pulled together to form a gargantuan figure of night and flame. Thirty feet tall, the creature has black wings that spread behind it like a velvety black cloak, but it hovers motionless in the air without beating them. Its upper body sports a huge chest of black ribs and monstrously large arms ending in hands with razor-tipped claws. Orange flame leaks out from between the ribs of its chest. Its lower body is nothing but a spiky, dangling tail. _An Ankou,_ Pavel realizes with shock. This creature must be the general who arranged the satyrs and trolls into their well-executed counter-ambush. Seeing its minions put to flight, the general has emerged from the shadows to rally the troops and test its personal might against the weakened condition of the Nightmarch leaders.
    
6. ### Darren [Pavel] _—_ Yesterday at 9:08 AM
    
    Faced with this abomination from the First World, Pavel finds clarity: _Edina wants to be friends. I don’t know what that means -- but more important, I don’t think I want to know. I don’t think I can handle it._ The creature looks down at Pavel. It opens its dragon-like snout in a hideous mockery of a smile, and flame licks out from between its jaws and out of its eye sockets. _Who would have guessed I’m such a coward?_ Pavel thinks. He hoists Briar, points a challenge at the Ankou, and launches himself at the fey nightmare's flaming head.
    
7. [](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1511880370168139776/1523722841063948479/Pavel__Ankou_2.jpg?ex=6a4dcdba&is=6a4c7c3a&hm=f5f8e7509f3d18b16bdfc41caf2b9d1b176a96a14ba50df474a2e410a8b33e73&)
